summary: Completed testing of PHONE BLOWER Auto-Dialer and MAX AGGRESSION DRIP Trigger Words features. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all features verified.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (59 leads in queue, 53 clients tagged 'New Lead')
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHONE BLOWER Auto-Dialer and MAX AGGRESSION DRIP Trigger Words features are fully implemented and working. Auto-dialer works in simulated mode (Twilio not configured). Trigger words are stored in enhanced_campaigns collection.

phone_blower_auto_dialer.start_auto_dial_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/phone-blower/auto-dial/start creates session and returns simulated call result
phone_blower_auto_dialer.twiml_blower_message: PASS - GET /api/phone-blower/twiml/blower-message returns TwiML with AI voice message 'Pay your bill...'
phone_blower_auto_dialer.ui_start_autodial_button: PASS - START AUTO-DIAL button visible on lead profile card
phone_blower_auto_dialer.ui_5min_auto_dialer_section: PASS - 5-MIN AUTO-DIALER section with description visible

max_aggression_trigger_words.launch_with_trigger_words: PASS - POST /api/campaigns/prebuilt/max_aggression/launch accepts trigger_words in body
max_aggression_trigger_words.get_trigger_words: PASS - GET /api/campaigns/{id}/trigger-words returns stored trigger words
max_aggression_trigger_words.ui_bulk_campaign_dialog: PASS - Bulk Templated Campaign dialog shows MAX AGGRESSION DRIP option
max_aggression_trigger_words.ui_step1_trigger_words: PASS - Step 1 shows 15 pre-built trigger words (stop, no, out, fuck you, etc.)
max_aggression_trigger_words.ui_trigger_word_removal: PASS - Each trigger word has x button to remove it
max_aggression_trigger_words.ui_custom_trigger_word: PASS - Input field to add custom trigger words
max_aggression_trigger_words.ui_step2_review_launch: PASS - Step 2 shows trigger words summary '15 Stop Trigger Words Active'

mocked_apis.Twilio Voice: MOCKED - Calls return status 'simulated' (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN not configured)

api_verification.POST /api/phone-blower/auto-dial/start: 200 OK - Creates auto-dial session, returns session_id and first_call result
api_verification.GET /api/phone-blower/auto-dial/active: 200 OK - Returns list of active auto-dial sessions
api_verification.POST /api/phone-blower/auto-dial/stop: 200 OK - Stops auto-dial session, returns stopped count
api_verification.GET /api/phone-blower/twiml/blower-messa: 200 OK - Returns TwiML XML with Polly.Matthew voice
api_verification.POST /api/campaigns/prebuilt/max_aggress: 200 OK - Launches campaign with trigger_words stored
